summary: Twilio Programmable Messaging REST API for sending SMS/MMS/WhatsApp messages, checking delivery status, listing message history, and managing message records.

auth.instructions: Authenticate with HTTP Basic auth. Recommended: API Key SID as username and API Key Secret as password. For local testing, Twilio also supports Account SID + Auth Token. Use your Account SID in the request path.

endpoints.name: create-message
endpoints.description: Send an outbound message. Requires `To`, one sender field (`From` or `MessagingServiceSid`), and message content (`Body`, `MediaUrl`, or `ContentSid`).

example.Body: Hello from the Twilio Messaging API

endpoints.name: fetch-message
endpoints.description: Fetch a single message resource by SID to inspect status, direction, segments, and delivery metadata.

endpoints.name: list-messages
endpoints.description: List message resources for an account with paging and common filters.

endpoints.name: redact-message-body
endpoints.description: Redact stored message content by updating the message and setting `Body` to an empty string.

endpoints.name: delete-message
endpoints.description: Delete a message resource from the account.
